data.title: San Francisco Peninsula starts culinary initiative to celebrate diverse dining landscape with new programming in multi-year plan.
data.description: A multi-year culinary initiative has been launched in San Mateo County, California, specifically on the San Francisco Peninsula. This initiative aims to celebrate the diverse dining landscape of the region through new programming. This endeavor will span across several years and will focus on showcasing the varied culinary offerings in the area.

data.title: Osisko Development to conduct US$125 million public offering to advance Cariboo Gold Project, with accessible base shelf prospectus and Canadian prospectus supplement.
data.description: The base shelf prospectus is now available for public access, while the Canadian prospectus supplement will be accessible within the next two business days. Both documents can be found on the company's issuer profile on the SEDAR website.

data.title: Toll Brothers introduces luxury townhomes in Milpitas, California's Parkside West; modern design, low-maintenance living.
data.description: A new development of upscale townhome-style condominiums blends contemporary aesthetics with a hassle-free living experience. These luxurious units offer a sleek design and require minimal maintenance, catering to those seeking a sophisticated yet convenient lifestyle. With a range of amenities, including [specific amenities], and prices starting at [specific starting price], these properties provide an attractive option for individuals looking for a stylish and easy-care residence. Experience the epitome of modern living in these exclusive condominiums.

data.title: 31% of Americans, especially young individuals, are optimistic about prediction markets reshaping culture, as per a recent survey.
data.description: According to a recent survey, approximately 31% of the American population, with a higher percentage among young individuals, believe that prediction markets will have a significant impact on reshaping culture.

data.title: VanEck introduces AVAX fund, making Avalanche the first altcoin to have a US ETF for investors, including traditional equities.
data.description: The Avalanche (AVAX) altcoin has recently been included in a spot ETF, enabling investors to access the token in addition to conventional equities.

data.title: Frontdoor, Inc. (NASDAQ: FTDR) plans to reveal Q4 and full-year 2025 financials on Feb. 26, 2026, 7:30am CST. Webcast available.
data.description: Frontdoor, Inc., a prominent provider of home warranties in the United States, disclosed plans to unveil its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025. The company, listed on NASDAQ as FTDR, will conduct a conference call on Thursday, February 26, 2026, at 7:30 a.m. CT (8:30 a.m. ET). Interested parties can sign up for the webcast through a provided link. The presentation during the conference call will showcase the company's outcomes.

data.title: Karbon Capital Partners allows separate trading of Class A shares and warrants starting January 27, 2026.
data.description: On January 26, 2026, Karbon Capital Partners Corp. revealed that starting January 27, 2026, investors holding units from the company's IPO will have the option to trade Class A ordinary shares and warrants separately. This move provides flexibility to shareholders, allowing them to trade these components independently.

data.title: Albertsons appoints Allison Pinkham as EVP and Chief HR Officer.
data.description: Boise, Idaho-based Albertsons Companies has appointed Allison Pinkham as the new Executive Vice President and Chief Human Resources Officer. In her new role, Pinkham will oversee all HR functions for the company. This move comes as part of the company's efforts to strengthen its leadership team and optimize its human resources strategy. Albertsons operates over 2,200 retail stores across the United States, with approximately 270,000 employees.

data.title: $164M annual staking revenue from over 2M ETH staked by Bitmine, totaling 4.2M ETH, of which 3.5% is the outstanding supply.
data.description: The Ether treasury, which is publicly traded, currently holds over 2 million ETH staked. In total, it has more than 4.2 million ETH in its possession, amounting to 3.5% of the outstanding supply.

data.title: Northland Power to release Q4 2025 financial results on Feb 25, 2026; earnings call on Feb 26 at 10am ET.
data.description: Toronto-based Northland Power Inc. (TSX: NPI) has revealed plans to unveil its fourth quarter financial performance for 2025 after market closure on February 25, 2026. The company's management is scheduled to conduct an earnings conference call and webcast at 10 a.m. Eastern Time on February 26, 2026. This will be followed by an interactive session for analysts to ask questions regarding the results.

data.title: NVIDIA's TensorRT for RTX boosts AI performance by 1.32x on RTX 5090, bringing self-optimizing AI to consumer GPUs.
data.description: The latest development from NVIDIA involves the implementation of TensorRT for RTX, which brings adaptive inference capabilities to AI workloads. This innovation allows for automatic optimization of AI tasks during runtime, resulting in a notable performance boost of 1.32 times specifically on RTX 5090 hardware. This enhancement is aimed at enhancing the efficiency and speed of AI processing, showcasing the potential benefits of utilizing this technology in real-time scenarios.

data.title: SSR Mining to release Q4 & full-year 2025 financial results on Feb 17, 2026; conference call at 5 pm EST.
data.description: Denver-based SSR Mining Inc. (Nasdaq/TSX: SSRM) will be announcing its full-year and fourth quarter financial results for 2025 on February 17, 2026, after markets close. Additionally, the Company will reveal its full-year 2026 operating guidance along with updated Mineral Reserves and Mineral Resources. A conference call to review the results is set for 5:00 pm EST on the same day. Interested parties including investors, media, and the public are welcome to participate in the conference call.

data.title: CF Industries, POET, and co-ops launch pilot for low-carbon fertilizer to reduce ethanol production carbon intensity. #sustainability #agriculture
data.description: In Northbrook, Illinois, CF Industries Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: CF), a prominent global producer of hydrogen and nitrogen products, and POET, the largest biofuels manufacturer globally, have initiated a pilot program in collaboration with significant agriculture co-operatives. The project aims to collectively establish a supply chain for low-carbon fertilizers. The primary objective of this pilot initiative is to showcase the effectiveness of utilizing low-carbon nitrogen fertilizers in significantly lowering the carbon footprint associated with corn production. This endeavor is envisioned to facilitate the creation of low carbon alternatives for fertilizers.

data.title: James Hardie to release FY26 Q3 earnings. Schedule includes conference call.(Location: Chicago)
data.description: Chicago-based company James Hardie has disclosed the schedule for the release of its third-quarter financial results for fiscal year 2026. The upcoming earnings release and associated conference call are set to provide stakeholders with vital insights into the company's performance. This announcement underscores the importance of transparency and communication within the business community.

data.title: KBRA assigns ratings to $325.7M RMBS from EFMT 2026-AE1, totaling 64 classes of certificates with 887 loans.
data.description: New York - KBRA has issued preliminary ratings for 64 categories of mortgage-backed certificates in the EFMT 2026-AE1 transaction. The RMBS deal totals $325.7 million and is sponsored by EFMT Sponsor LLC. The pool consists entirely of first liens on non-owner occupied (58.0%) and second homes (42.0%) adhering to agency standards. With 887 loans in the pool, the average seasoning is about five months. The transaction involves multiple loan originators.
